nodes.label: AI as writing assistant for drafting
nodes.grounding_span: I use AI for writing-heavy tasks, such as drafting emails

nodes.label: AI as brainstorming and idea generator
nodes.label_negative: AI misunderstanding or failing to capture ideas
nodes.grounding_span: sometimes it comes up with the words I could not to complete my thought

nodes.label: AI reliability and hallucination
nodes.grounding_span: Hallucinations are a problem, so my approach is often using AI to start in the right direction, but I always assume the AI is lying to me

nodes.label: AI as coding assistant
nodes.label_negative: AI use for complex coding tasks
nodes.grounding_span: For simple or repetitive coding I will use AI, but for complex tasks I prefer to do them myself

nodes.label: AI delegation for simple tasks
nodes.grounding_span: For really simple stuff with lots of boilerplate, I completely delegate to the AI

nodes.label: AI impact on skill maintenance
nodes.label_negative: Skill deterioration from over-reliance on AI
nodes.grounding_span: my own skillset deteriorates if I use AI too much in that area

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: I find it is much quicker to write a couple rough sentences

nodes.label: Quality of output
nodes.grounding_span: the writing was such high quality that I could be a journalist

nodes.label: Personal competence and skill development
nodes.grounding_span: I think those skills are important to maintain in order to know how to correctly guide the AI

nodes.label: Reluctance to use AI for writing
Distrust due to hallucination experience
nodes.grounding_span: I always assume the AI is lying to me

nodes.label: Frustration with AI for coding
nodes.grounding_span: I am hesitant to use AI for [complex coding]

nodes.label: Optimism about AI as future tool
nodes.grounding_span: As it gets better I will lean on it more and more

nodes.label: Pragmatic experimentation with AI limitations
nodes.grounding_span: Often I will use AI to see if I can do a task faster than if I did it manually. If it does not work, then it is fine

nodes.label: Conservative assume-the-worst approach to AI outputs
nodes.grounding_span: This is the conservative assume-the-worst approach
